steps.title: Test both inequalities
steps.content: A solution must satisfy both $y\le x$ and $y\le -x$.

steps.title: Check the correct pair
steps.content: For $(0,-1)$, the first inequality gives $-1\le0$, which is true. The second gives $-1\le -0$, or $-1\le0$, which is also true.

steps.title: Eliminate the others
steps.content: $(1,0)$ fails $y\le -x$, $(-1,0)$ fails $y\le x$, and $(0,1)$ fails both. Therefore D is correct.
